subject: [PATCH v6 1/2] mm: bypass mmap_miss heuristic for VM_EXEC readahead

reviews.author: Jan Kara
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the patch, suggesting that it may not correctly handle the case where fault-around is disabled. Proposed an alternative solution to address this concern.

2026-05-28.patch_summary: The patch proposes to bypass the mmap_miss heuristic for VM_EXEC readahead, which is a mechanism intended to prevent speculative mmap readahead when a file appears to be accessed randomly. The current implementation of this heuristic can lead to stale throttling for executable mappings, causing the readahead behavior to be suppressed unnecessarily.
